name: medicine-wheel
description: Medicine Wheel — Interactive visual layer for Indigenous relational research with Four Directions, ceremonies, and narrative arcs

scripts.build:packages: cd src/ontology-core && npm install && npm run build && cd ../ceremony-protocol && npm install && npm run build && cd ../narrative-engine && npm install && npm run build && cd ../graph-viz && npm install && npm run build && cd ../relational-query && npm install && npm run build && cd ../prompt-decomposition && npm install && npm run build && cd ../ui-components && npm install && npm run build && cd ../data-store && npm install && npm run build && cd ../session-reader && npm install && npm run build
